description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit constructed from light-colored wood with a natural grain pattern. The front features five evenly spaced open shelves, providing ample vertical storage space for books, decor, or other items. The sides are solid and flat, while the back panel is also made of wood, matching the rest of the structure. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible doors, handles, or decorative elements. The finish appears smooth and matte, giving it a clean and modern look. This type of shelving unit is commonly found in urban environments such as offices, libraries, garages, or public waiting areas.
description: A tall, light wood shelving unit with five open shelves and a smooth, matte finish. It has a simple, functional design with no doors or handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing five open shelves and the wood grain pattern.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat panel with no visible shelves or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a continuous wood back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing a plain, flat side panel.
